sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 technique unit on the two facing DALF written genres: l'éditorial (the paper's own argumentative voice — occasion, position, the editorial 'nous', with the 2009 Copenhagen 56-newspaper editorial as set piece) and la synthèse de documents écrits (the DALF C1 Production écrite task: nature/idée générale per document, thème commun + problématique, confronter, reformuler, strict objectivity). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 8 'Énergies' ('Techniques pour faire une synthèse de documents écrits', pp. 114-115; 'À Copenhague, douze jours pour changer notre monde', p. 108). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
